Extracted MCP servers

- brave-search-mcp-server/*
  - Found in: `platform-io.agent.md`, `microcontroller expert.agent.md`, `python-uv-expert.agent.md`
  - Purpose (from agents): datasheets, forum threads, wiring, errors — general web/MCP research via Brave Search.

- microsoftdocs/mcp/*
  - Found in: `platform-io.agent.md`, `microcontroller expert.agent.md`, `python-uv-expert.agent.md`
  - Purpose: Official Microsoft / Azure / VS Code documentation access via MCP.

- pylance-mcp-server/*
  - Found in: `python-uv-expert.agent.md`
  - Purpose: Pylance / Python language server docs and tooling (IDE integration research).

- upstash/context7 (aka io.github.upstash/context7/*)
  - Found in: `platform-io.agent.md`, `microcontroller expert.agent.md`, `python-uv-expert.agent.md`
  - Purpose: Context7 / Upstash integration used for resolving library/package docs, fetching code examples, and retrieving Context7-compatible library IDs. Useful for getting authoritative library docs and examples.

- mermaid/*
  - Found in: `platform-io.agent.md`, `microcontroller expert.agent.md`, `python-uv-expert.agent.md`
  - Purpose: Mermaid diagram generation/validation/preview MCP endpoints (create/validate/preview diagrams, used when agents produce architecture or flow diagrams).

- doist/todoist-ai (tool listed as `doist/todoist-ai/search` and various Todoist MCP endpoints)
  - Found in: `platform-io.agent.md`, `microcontroller expert.agent.md`, `python-uv-expert.agent.md`
  - Purpose: Todoist project/task management MCP endpoints — search, create, update, and manage tasks/projects; used for generating and syncing task lists or project plans.

- sequential-thinking/*
  - Found in: `platform-io.agent.md`, `microcontroller expert.agent.md`, `python-uv-expert.agent.md`
  - Purpose: Sequential-thinking / chain-of-thought planning MCP endpoint. Used by agents to break down complex multi-step problems into ordered thought steps, branching revisions, and verification steps.
